top_signals.title: Transfix integrates Highway carrier vetting into TMS
top_signals.summary:
Transfix has integrated Highway's carrier vetting technology into its transportation management system, allowing freight brokers and third-party logistics providers to verify carrier identity, insurance and operating authority without leaving the platform. The integration reflects a broader industry shift toward embedding fraud prevention directly into transportation management software.

The post Transfix integrates Highway carrier vetting into TMS appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Waver as Wall Street Rotation Gains Speed: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders kept driving a rotation out of high-profile chipmakers and into a broader category of companies tuned to improving growth prospects, with stocks wavering at the end of a volatile week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
